src/main/java/com/example/demo/advice/Ap.general_idea: Update import statements from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to comply with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/controlle.general_idea: Replace javax.validation import with jakarta.validation to comply with Spring Boot 3 namespace changes.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/dto/UserR.general_idea: Removed the 'id' field from the UserRequest DTO.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/model/Use.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Migrate Bean Validation annotations from javax.validation.constraints to jakarta.validation.constraints to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot starter parent version to 3.1.5 to align with the Java 17 migration.
Update the Maven java.version property to 17 to enforce compilation and runtime on JDK 17.
